title: polygala hispida
intro: Polygala hispida, also known as common polygala or hairy polygala, is a species of flowering plant in the milkwort family (Polygalaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Polygala hispida include its ability to relieve digestive issues, reduce fever, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and made into teas, infusions, or capsules to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
